description_long: This is a modern, boxy chaise with a wide, deep seat and high, straight backrest and armrests, all upholstered in a light gray fabric. The seat is generously padded, providing a comfortable sitting area, while the back and armrests form a continuous, squared enclosure around the user. The upholstery appears smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative stitching. The base consists of four black wooden legs arranged in an intersecting X-shape, giving the piece a contemporary and slightly industrial look. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on comfort and functionality. This chaise would be suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern, boxy chaise with light gray fabric upholstery, high straight armrests and back, and a black intersecting X-shaped wooden base. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, deep seat, high straight backrest, and both armrests, with the intersecting X-shaped black base visible below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the straight, tall armrest and the depth of the seat, with the X-shaped base partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the backrest and both armrests, with the intersecting legs clearly seen underneath.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the straight armrest and seat depth, with the X-shaped base visible.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and rectangular, forming a continuous line with the armrests. It is fully upholstered in smooth, light gray fabric with no visible decorative elements or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, straight and at the same height as the backrest, forming a boxy enclosure.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are constructed from black wood and arranged in an intersecting X-shape, providing a modern and sturdy base with a slightly industrial aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached seat cushion that fills the seating area, with no additional loose or layered cushions visible.
